bullet_priority_strategy: Lead with AI/ML bullets. Filter themes for AI, ML, LLM, RAG. Prioritize bullets that mention model deployment, fine-tuning, prompt engineering, inference pipelines, or evaluation metrics. Quantify with latency, accuracy, throughput, or user scale.
project_priority_strategy: Lead with projects involving LLMs, RAG pipelines, AI-powered features, or ML model integration. Surface stack items like OpenAI, Azure OpenAI, LangChain, HuggingFace, vector databases.
summary_focus: AI/ML engineering experience with LLMs, RAG systems, and production model deployment.
